top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Is Said to Be More Than Four Times Oversubscribed
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering has attracted demand for more than four times the available shares, according to people familiar with the matter, ahead of the Elon Musk-led rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence firm stopping taking orders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sitting Out the SpaceX IPO? Why That’s Hard to Do
top_signals.summary: Wall Street has been fixated on the stock market debut of Elon Musk’s SpaceX. The rocket-and-AI company’s initial public offering on June 12 is set to be the largest in history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ashley’s Frasers Seeks to Buy Rest of Boss for $2.3 Billion
top_signals.summary: Frasers Group Plc offered to buy the rest of Hugo Boss AG for about €2 billion ($2.3 billion) as billionaire Mike Ashley seeks to add another fashion brand to his growing collection.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Drugmaker Parabilis Soars 67% After $745 Million IPO, Placement
top_signals.summary: Parabilis Medicines Inc. shares jumped as much as 67% in its trading debut, after the company raised nearly $745 million in an upsized US initial public offering that priced above its marketed range and a private placement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How America Lost Command of the Commons
top_signals.summary: The oceans may soon be tolled.

top_signals.title: Don’t Give Up on Global Order
top_signals.summary: America depends on global order—and can restore it.

top_signals.title: Microsoft Defender 'RoguePlanet' zero-day grants SYSTEM privileges
top_signals.summary: A security researcher has released a new Microsoft Defender zero-day exploit named "RoguePlanet" just hours after Microsoft fixed two previously disclosed flaws during June 2026 Patch Tuesday. [...]
